title: Image
description: A flexible image component with support for object-fit, object-position, loading priority, and lazy loading.

manual.title: Add utility function
manual.description: Create a cn utility function if you don't have one already.

manual.title: Copy the component code
manual.description: Create a new file and paste the image component code.

examples.title: Default
examples.description: A basic image with the default cover fit and rounded corners.

examples.title: Cover
examples.description: fit="cover" — fills the container, cropping if needed. This is the default.

examples.title: Contain
examples.description: fit="contain" — scales the image to fit entirely within the container, preserving aspect ratio.

examples.title: Fill
examples.description: fit="fill" — stretches the image to fill the container, ignoring aspect ratio.

examples.title: Scale Down
examples.description: fit="scale-down" — scales the image down to fit, but never up beyond its natural size.

examples.title: None
examples.description: fit="none" — renders the image at its natural size, overflowing if larger than the container.
